characters.name: Miss Aberdeen
characters.description: Miss AberdeenBiographical InformationStatusAliveAppearancesFirstRomancing Mister BridgertonLastTime TransfixedCount2Seasons3&4Portrayed bySarah Turner Miss Aberdeenis a lady of the ton.

characters.name: Hermione Abernathy
characters.description: Hermione AbernathyBiographical InformationBorn1807AliasHermione WatsonTitle(s)Countess of FennsworthLady FennsworthFamilial InformationMaritalRichard Abernathy(husband)SiblingsBrotherParentsViscount WatsonLady WatsonOthersLucy Bridgerton(sister-in-law)AppearancesOnlyOn The Way To The Wedding Hermione Abernathy(néeWatson) is the best friend, companion, and later sister-in-law ofLucy Bridgerton. Hermione was born as the second child and only daughter of a viscount and his wife, Lady Watson. She attended Miss Moss's with her friend, Lucy, for three years.

characters.name: Richard Abernathy
characters.description: Richard AbernathyBiographical InformationBorn1805StatusAliveTitle(s)Lord Fennsworth9th Earl of Fennsworth[1]Familial InformationMaritalHermione Abernathy(wife)SiblingsLucy BridgertonParentsLord Abernathy †Lady Abernathy †OthersRobert Abernathy(uncle)Harriet Abernathy(aunt)Gregory Bridgerton(brother-in-law)Katharine Bridgerton(niece)Richard Bridgerton(nephew)Hermione Bridgerton(niece)Daphne Bridgerton II(niece)Anthony Bridgerton II(nephew)Benedict Bridgerton II(nephew)Colin Bridgerton II(nephew)Eloise Bridgerton II(niece)Francesca Bridgerton II(niece)AppearancesOnlyOn The Way To The Wedding Richard Abernathyis the brother ofLucy Bridgerton. Richard had always been in love with Hermione, secretly pining for her, despite her being his sister's best friend and his close friend and classmate's younger sister. However, when he returned after graduating from Cambridge to share some news for his sister, Lucy, he had an encounter with Hermione, and with the attraction being mutual; the two soon married.

characters.name: Lord Adams
characters.description: Lord AdamsBiographical InformationStatusAliveAppearancesOnlyYes or NoSeasons4Portrayed byAdam Hashmi Lord Adamsis a suitor who pushed Eloise. Lord Adams was at Hyacinth's recital when he spotted Eloise. He approached her and said he hadn't seen her in society recently. He asked if she was making a return. She just smiled awkwardly back at him.

characters.name: Lord Adams
characters.description: Lord AdamsBiographical InformationStatusAliveAppearancesOnlyYes or NoSeasons4Portrayed byAdam Hashmi Lord Adamsis a suitor who pushed Eloise. Lord Adams was at Hyacinth's recital when he spotted Eloise. He approached her and said he hadn't seen her in society recently. He asked if she was making a return. She just smiled awkwardly back at him.

characters.name: Felicity Albansdale
characters.description: Felicity AlbansdaleBiographical InformationBorn1803AliasFelicity FeatheringtonFamilial InformationMaritalGeoffrey Albansdale(husband)SiblingsPrudence HuxleyPhilippa BerbrookePenelope BridgertonParentsPortia FeatheringtonOthersRobert Huxley(brother-in-law)Nigel Berbrooke(brother-in-law)Colin Bridgerton(brother-in-law)Agatha Bridgerton(niece)Thomas Bridgerton(nephew)Jane Bridgerton(niece)George Bridgerton(nephew)AppearancesFirstRomancing Mister BridgertonFelicity Albansdale(néeFeatherington) is the sister ofPenelope Bridgerton. Felicity is the youngest daughter ofPortia Featherington. Her father died shortly after she was born. She became friends withHyacinth Bridgerton, who is her age. While her sisters were in their London seasons, she was still in the schoolroom and didn't attend any balls or parties. By the time she made her debut, her two eldest sisters,PrudenceandPhilippa, were married. Felicity was now out on the Marriage Mart. She was courted by Geoffrey Albansdale and appeared ready to marry him. WhenColin Bridgertonreturned to London, Portia wanted to match Felicity with Colin, despite her interest in Geoffrey. Felicity reluctantly attended the Smythe-Smith musicale with Penelope. Afterwards, she attended the Macclesfield ball with Hyacinth, as Penelope chaperoned them. WhenCressida Twombleyannounced she was Lady Whistledown, Felicity discussed whether she was with Hyacinth, Penelope, Colin, andLady Danbury. Felicity is considered to be the most attractive looking of the Featherington sisters. She has a sharp wit, like Penelope, and is also sly and clever.
characters.personality_section: Felicity is considered to be the most attractive looking of the Featherington sisters. She has a sharp wit, like Penelope, and is also sly and clever.

characters.name: Dolores Allison
characters.description: Dolores AllisonBiographical InformationStatusAliveAliasDolores StowellTitle(s)Lady AllisonFamilial InformationMaritalLord Allison(husband)ParentsLady StowellAppearancesFirstOut of the ShadowsLastThe Field Next to the Other RoadCount6Seasons3&4Portrayed byKitty Devlin Dolores Allison(néeStowell)  is one of the debutantes in 1815. Lady Whistledown described Dolores as a most accomplished young lady. However, when she debuted, she, along with all the other debutantes, failed to impress the queen.[1]

characters.name: Lord Allison
characters.description: Lord AllisonBiographical InformationStatusAliveTitle(s)Lord AllisonFamilial InformationMaritalDolores Allison(wife)AppearancesOnlyThe Field Next to the Other RoadSeasons4Portrayed byJude Powell Lord Allisonis a gentleman of the ton and the husband ofDolores Allison. Lord Allison attendedLady Millrose'sgarden party with his wife. When they spottedAraminta Gunentering with her daughters, despite having poached the Millroses' coachman, they agreed she had a lot of nerve.

characters.name: Miss Alvarez
characters.description: Miss AlvarezBiographical InformationStatusAliveAppearancesFirstThe WaltzLastTime TransfixedCount2Seasons4Portrayed byAlejandra Deane Miss Alvarezis a debutante. Miss Alvarez was at the Bridgerton masquerade ball whenBenedict Bridgertonapproached her andMiss Power. Miss Alvarez complimented his disguise, calling it superb, but he noted that she recognized him immediately. She attributed it to the Bridgerton build. Miss Power then said that despite being second eldest, he was the last brother left unmarried. Benedict reminded them not to forget Gregory and then excused himself from the conversation.[1]

characters.name: Lord Ambrose
characters.description: Lord AmbroseBiographical InformationStatusAliveAppearancesOnlyDiamond of the First WaterSeasons1Portrayed bySimon Lennon Lord Ambroseis a man who tried to court Daphne during her debut season. Shortly after her societal debut, Daphne was at an event when Lord Ambrose approached her and took an interest in her. However, Anthony quickly interjected and reminded Ambrose of his gambling debts, warning him off Daphne.

characters.name: Lord Ambrose
characters.description: Lord AmbroseBiographical InformationStatusAliveAppearancesOnlyDiamond of the First WaterSeasons1Portrayed bySimon Lennon Lord Ambroseis a man who tried to court Daphne during her debut season. characters.name: Marcus Anderson
characters.description: Marcus AndersonBiographical InformationStatusAliveTitle(s)Lord AndersonFamilial InformationMaritalNessa †(wife)Violet Bridgerton(ex-fiancée)ChildrenChildrenSiblingsAgatha DanburyParentsFatherOthersHerman Danbury†(brother-in-law)Dominic Danbury(nephew)Three other niblingsAppearancesFirstForces of NatureLastDance in the CountryCount14Seasons3&4Portrayed byDaniel Francis Marcus Andersonis the brother ofAgatha Danbury. Marcus came to Mayfair to visit his sister. On his first day in town, he metViolet Bridgertonwhen he bent down to pick up her dropped glove. After he'd entered the Innovations Ball, they met again and bonded over their children, though his children were all grown and out of the house. Lady Danbury interrupted and introduced them, informing Violet that Marcus was her brother and he was just visiting. Violet welcomed him to Mayfair and he told her he was enjoying his time there already.[1]

characters.name: Tilley Arnold
characters.description: Tilley ArnoldBiographical InformationStatusAliveTitle(s)Lady ArnoldFamilial InformationMaritalLord Arnold​​ †(husband)AppearancesFirstForces of NatureLastInto the LightCount6Seasons3Portrayed byHannah New Tilley Arnoldis a widow who became interested inBenedict Bridgerton. Tilley was atLord Hawkins'presentation of his new hot air balloon. There, she met Benedict Bridgerton when he made a comment about the balloon being good to escape eager mamas. He apologized, having not realized a lady could overhear, but she said a lady could be interested in engineering. Then she defended the technology to everyone in the tent, saying it would drive ingenuity forward.

characters.name: Edwina Bagwell
characters.description: Edwina BagwellBiographical InformationAliasEdwina SheffieldFamilial InformationMaritalMr. Bagwell(husband)SiblingsKate Bridgerton(half-sister)ParentsMary Sheffield†OthersAnthony Bridgerton(brother-in-law)Edmund Bridgerton II(nephew)Miles Bridgerton(nephew)Charlotte Bridgerton(niece)Mary Bridgerton(niece)AppearancesFirstThe Viscount Who Loved MeLastThe Bridgertons: Happily Ever After Edwina Bagwell(néeSheffield) is the younger sister ofKate Bridgerton. Edwina is the daughter of a baron's second son and his second wife,Mary. She grew up close to her older half-sister, Kate. Edwina is the Incomparable for her beauty and grace. She is also sharp and perceptive, and prefers to spend her days reading books rather than being at balls. She wishes to marry a scholar who shares her interests but, knowing her family's financial struggles, Edwina is faced with pressure to marry a nobleman or wealthy gentleman who can provide for them.
characters.personality_section: Edwina is the Incomparable for her beauty and grace. She is also sharp and perceptive, and prefers to spend her days reading books rather than being at balls. characters.name: Lord Barnell
characters.description: Lord BarnellBiographical InformationStatusAliveAppearancesOnlyOut of the ShadowsSeasons3Portrayed byMartin Sarreal Lord Barnellis one of the gentlemen of the ton. Lord Barnell was at Lady Danbury's Four Seasons ball, the first ball of the season, whenPenelope Bridgertoncaught his eye. He approached her, along withLord LeiberandLord Garret, and they complimented her gown. As she talked to them about her hobbies, she began to ramble, leading to an awkward situation. Lord Barnell and other gentlemen excused themselves and left.

characters.name: Alfie Barrow
characters.description: Alfie BarrowBiographical InformationStatusAliveProfessional InformationJobFootmanWorkplacePenwood HouseAppearancesFirstThe WaltzLastDance in the CountryCount6Seasons4Portrayed byDavid Moorst Alfie Barrowis a footman for Penwood House. He previously worked forAraminta Gunand now works forCressida Gun. Alfie was working at Penwood House whileSophie Baektried to make a new mask quickly to replace one thatRosamund Licouldn't find. When Sophie was called away, Alfie said he would finish it as he knew how to sew. He finished the mask, but by then, Rosamund had found hers and they had left. Instead, Alfie andIrmaencouraged Sophie to sneak out for the night so she could attend the Bridgertons' masquerade ball, offering to help cover for her. She already had a mask and Alfie got a dress from the attic and a pair of Araminta's shoes to complete the look.[1]Alfie went with her in the carriage and told her to go in with a large group to disguise herself and to be out by midnight. At the end of the night, he took her home and warned her whenAramintaand her step-sisters had returned home. Sophie thanked the two of them and went to bring Araminta and her daughters their tea.[2] Alfie is a dry, sarcastic footman at Penwood House. Alfie sometimes can't help but let a cheeky comment fly, especially when he sees Sophie mistreated.[7]
characters.personality_section: Alfie is a dry, sarcastic footman at Penwood House. Alfie sometimes can't help but let a cheeky comment fly, especially when he sees Sophie mistreated.[7]

characters.name: Lord Basilio
characters.description: Lord BasilioBiographical InformationStatusAliveTitle(s)ViscountAppearancesFirstOut of the ShadowsLastThe WaltzCount3Seasons3&4Portrayed byJames Bradwell Lord Basiliois one of the gentlemen of the ton. Lord Basilio attended Lady Danbury's Four Seasons Ball, the first ball of the 1815 season. At the ball, he talked toFrancesca Bridgerton, one of the season's debutantes. He asked her about her hobbies and after telling him she played pianoforte, she became uncomfortable with the conversation and excused herself.[1]

characters.name: Caroline Basset
characters.description: Caroline Findlay-WattBiographical InformationBorn1816AliasCaroline BassetTitle(s)Lady Findlay-WattFamilial InformationMaritalGeoffrey Findlay-Watt(husband)ChildrenHenry Findlay-WattVictoria Findlay-WattSiblingsAmelia BassetBelinda BassetDavid BassetEdward BassetParentsSimon BassetDaphne BassetGrandparentsEdmund Bridgerton†Violet BridgertonOthersFor a complete family tree, see theBridgerton family tree Caroline Findlay-Watt(néeBasset) is the daughter ofDaphneandSimon Basset. In 1834, Caroline was attracted to Frederick Snowe-Mann-Formsby and could not stop talking about him, annoying her sisterBelinda.[1]Caroline later marriedGeoffrey Findlay-Watt.

characters.name: Daphne Basset
characters.description: Daphne BassetBiographical InformationBorn1792AliasDaphne BridgertonTitle(s)Duchess of HastingsFamilial InformationMaritalSimon Basset(husband)ChildrenAmelia BassetBelinda BassetCaroline BassetDavid BassetEdward BassetSiblingsAnthony BridgertonBenedict BridgertonColin BridgertonEloise CraneFrancesca StirlingGregory BridgertonHyacinth St. ClairParentsViolet BridgertonEdmund Bridgerton†GrandparentsAlexandra BridgertonLord Bridgerton †[1]Grand-childrenCharles JoliffeThomas JoliffeMay ButlerHenry Findlay-WattVictoria Findlay-WattOthersBillie Bridgerton(aunt)Hugo Bridgerton †(uncle)Georgiana Bridgerton(aunt)For a complete family tree, see theBridgerton family treeDaphne Basset(néeBridgerton) is the fourth Bridgerton child and eldest daughter. For a complete family tree, see theBridgerton family tree Daphne is the fourth child ofEdmundandViolet Bridgerton. She was born 18 months after her older brother,Colin. She was ten when Edmund suddenly died and was the one who told her oldest brother,Anthony, the news. Growing up in the Bridgerton family, Daphne was surrounded by love and joy, and hopes to marry and have a family as wonderful as her own.  As the eldest daughter, Daphne feels pressure to make a good match so her younger sisters will also marry well. But the more she's exposed to the real world and London society, Daphne realizes she will face many challenges; her only hope is that the love she knows and has experienced will be the key to conquering those challenges.
characters.personality_section: Growing up in the Bridgerton family, Daphne was surrounded by love and joy, and hopes to marry and have a family as wonderful as her own.  As the eldest daughter, Daphne feels pressure to make a good match so her younger sisters will also marry well. But the more she's exposed to the real world and London society, Daphne realizes she will face many challenges; her only hope is that the love she knows and has experienced will be the key to conquering those challenges.

characters.name: David Basset
characters.description: David BassetBiographical InformationBorn1817Title(s)Earl ClyvedonLord ClyvedonFamilial InformationSiblingsAmelia BassetBelinda BassetCaroline BassetEdward BassetParentsSimon BassetDaphne BassetGrandparentsEdmund Bridgerton†Violet BridgertonOthersFor a complete family tree, see theBridgerton family tree David "Davey" Bassetis the son ofDaphneandSimon Basset. David was the firstborn son of Simon and Daphne, after they had three daughters:Amelia,Belinda, andCaroline. Lady Whistledown correctly guessed what David's parents would name him in her column before they could announce it to anyone.

characters.name: Edward Basset
characters.description: Edward BassetBiographical InformationBorn1834Title(s)Lord EdwardFamilial InformationSiblingsAmelia BassetBelinda BassetCaroline BassetDavid BassetParentsSimon BassetDaphne BassetGrandparentsEdmund Bridgerton†Violet BridgertonOthersFor a complete family tree, see theBridgerton family treeEdward Bassetis the son ofDaphneandSimon Basset. Edward was born late in life to Daphne and Simon, who were both in their 40s when Edward was born. He was born 17 years after his nearest sibling in age; Daphne was worried about Edward not having any companions his own age. Fortunately, Daphne's brotherGregoryandhis wifealso had children around the same time Edward was born, and he grew up playing with his cousins.

characters.name: Sarah Basset
characters.description: Sarah BassetBiographical InformationStatusDeceasedTitle(s)Duchess of HastingsFamilial InformationMaritalDuke of HastingsChildrenSimon BassetGrand-childrenAugust BassetGrandchild[1]OthersDaphne Basset(daughter-in-law)AppearancesOnlyShock and DelightSeasons1Portrayed byDaphne Di Cinto Sarah Bassetwas Simon's mother. Sarah was married to theDuke of Hastings. She was also a close friend ofLady Agatha Danbury. At some point, she became pregnant. After some time, she went into labor. She had a difficult labor and eventually gave birth to her son, Simon. While her husband presented Simon to his friends, Sarah started hemorrhaging. The bleeding was extensive and Sarah ultimately died, with a heartbroken Lady Danbury at her bedside.[2]

The bleeding was extensive and Sarah ultimately died, with a heartbroken Lady Danbury at her bedside.[2]

characters.name: Simon Basset
characters.description: Simon Arthur Henry Fitzranulph BassetBiographical InformationBornApril[1]1784Title(s)Duke of HastingsEarl Clyvedon (formerly)Familial InformationMaritalDaphne Basset(wife)ChildrenAmelia BassetBelinda BassetCaroline BassetDavid BassetEdward BassetSiblingsTwo siblings †ParentsDuke of Hastings †Sarah Basset †Grand-childrenCharles JoliffeThomas JoliffeMay ButlerHenry Findlay-WattVictoria Findlay-WattOthersFor a complete family tree, see theBridgerton family treeAppearancesFirstThe Duke and I Simon Bassetis the husband ofDaphne Basset. Simon was born to the Duke and Duchess of Hastings after many years of trying to have a child. Simon's mother died in childbirth. When Simon was four, he was revealed to have a profound stutter. His father immediately wrote him off, saying he was dead to him. Nurse Hopkins helped Simon improve his speech considerably by the time he was 11, and he wrote his father many letters telling him of his progress. After not receiving any response, Simon insisted on Nurse Hopkins taking him to see his father. They went to London, where Simon tried to show his father that he could speak, but seeing his father made Simon unable to speak, and the Duke mocked him before sending him away. Simon walked away, hurt and swearing vengeance. Left to fend for himself by his cruel father, Simon learned to take care of himself and succeed in life. Simon is still left with bitterness to his father, and wishes to gain the ultimate victory by letting his lineage die. He has no wish to marry or be a part of the ton – until he meets Daphne Bridgerton.
characters.personality_section: Left to fend for himself by his cruel father, Simon learned to take care of himself and succeed in life. Simon is still left with bitterness to his father, and wishes to gain the ultimate victory by letting his lineage die. He has no wish to marry or be a part of the ton – until he meets Daphne Bridgerton.

characters.name: Simon Basset
characters.actor_name: Regé-Jean PageOscar Coleman(4 years old)Cairo Eusebe(6 years old)Lucas Booth-Clibborn(11 years old)
characters.description: Simon Arthur Henry Fitzranulph BassetBiographical InformationStatusAliveTitle(s)Duke of HastingsFamilial InformationMaritalDaphne Basset(wife)ChildrenAugust BassetChild[1]ParentsSarah Basset†Duke of Hastings†OthersLady Agatha Danbury(godmother)For a complete family tree, see theBridgerton Family TreeAppearancesFirstDiamond of the First WaterLastAfter the RainCount8Seasons1Portrayed byRegé-Jean PageOscar Coleman(4 years old)Cairo Eusebe(6 years old)Lucas Booth-Clibborn(11 years old)Simon Bassetis the husband ofDaphne Basset. For a complete family tree, see theBridgerton Family Tree As Simon was born, his father waited outside, only concerned with whether or not he would have an heir. When his mother cried out, his father ran inside the room, where Simon was then born. After learning it was a son, he took Simon out to show him off while Sarah died of a hemorrhage. Having newly returned to London, the Duke of Hastings finds himself the primary topic of conversation amongst marriage-minded misses and ambitious mamas alike. Yet, for reasons of his own, our devastating Duke has zero interest in his title, society, or taking a wife. He is reserved and keeps his emotions close to his chest, is morally upstanding and values honour. He is kind and humorous, willing to poke fun with Daphne when at balls.

characters.name: Lady Berbrooke
characters.description: Lady BerbrookeBiographical InformationStatusAliveTitle(s)The Dowager Baroness BerbrookeFamilial InformationChildrenNigel BerbrookeGrand-childrenGrandsonAppearancesOnlyShock and DelightSeasons1Portrayed byCaroline Quentin Lady BerbrookeisNigel Berbrooke'smother. When Nigel became insistent that he was going to marryDaphne, Daphne andher motherinvited his mother over for tea. She immediately started talking about how wonderful her son was and how she never had another because she'd already reached perfection. She told Daphne she must work harder to attract Nigel as he had turned down more attractive suitors.

characters.name: Nigel Berbrooke
characters.description: Nigel BerbrookeBiographical InformationStatusAliveTitle(s)BaronLord BerbrookeFamilial InformationChildrenSonParentsLady BerbrookeAppearancesFirstDiamond of the First WaterLastShock and DelightCount2Seasons1Portrayed byJamie Beamish Lord Berbrooke Nigel Berbrookeis a suitor who pursued Daphne in spite of her objections. A smug, presumptuous, inelegant and awkward suitor on this year's marriage mart. Nigel has his eyes on the prize - that'd be Daphne Bridgerton, of course.

characters.name: Philippa Berbrooke
characters.description: Philippa BerbrookeBiographical InformationAliasPhilippa FeatheringtonFamilial InformationMaritalNigel Berbrooke(husband)SiblingsPrudence HuxleyPenelope BridgertonFelicity AlbansdaleParentsPortia FeatheringtonOthersAgatha Bridgerton(niece)Thomas Bridgerton(nephew)Jane Bridgerton(niece)George Bridgerton(nephew)Robert Huxley(brother-in-law)Colin Bridgerton(brother-in-law)Geoffrey Albansdale(brother-in-law)Neville Berbrooke(brother-in-law)AppearancesFirstThe Duke and ILastRomancing Mister Bridgerton Philippa Berbrooke(néeFeatherington) is the sister ofPenelope Bridgerton. During her second season with older sisterPrudenceand Penelope's first, Philippa attendedLady Danbury's ball. Their mother,Portia, introduced them toSimon Basset, telling him that Philippa is an expert watercolorist. Lady Danbury then came by and pushed Portia and her daughters away from Simon. Philippa, like Prudence, blindly followed her mother's lead, and is not considered intelligent, pretty, or even elegant. They were also dressed by Portia in colors that did not suit them, but they followed their mother's advice that "happy" colors make a girl seem happy and attract men.
characters.personality_section: Philippa, like Prudence, blindly followed her mother's lead, and is not considered intelligent, pretty, or even elegant. characters.name: Alexander Bridgerton
characters.description: Alexander BridgertonBiographical InformationBorn1820Familial InformationSiblingsCharles BridgertonWilliam BridgertonViolet Bridgerton IIParentsBenedict BridgertonSophie BridgertonGrandparentsEdmund Bridgerton†Violet BridgertonRichard Gunningworth†OthersPosy Reiling(aunt)For a complete family tree, see theBridgerton family tree For a complete family tree, see theBridgerton family tree Alexander Bridgertonis the second son ofBenedictandSophie Bridgerton. Sophie describes her two oldest sons (Charles and Alexander) as: "...the most handsome, brilliant creatures ever to be born anywhere, anytime, any ... well, anyanyone could come up with." His step-aunt, Posy, describes him as "the most squeezable, adorable thing."[1]
characters.personality_section: Sophie describes her two oldest sons (Charles and Alexander) as: "...the most handsome, brilliant creatures ever to be born anywhere, anytime, any ... well, anyanyone could come up with." His step-aunt, Posy, describes him as "the most squeezable, adorable thing."[1]

characters.name: Anthony Bridgerton
characters.description: Anthony BridgertonBiographical InformationBornSeptember 17, 1784[1]Title(s)7th Viscount Bridgerton[2]Lord BridgertonFamilial InformationMaritalKate Bridgerton(wife)ChildrenEdmund Bridgerton IIMiles BridgertonCharlotte BridgertonMary BridgertonSiblingsBenedict BridgertonColin BridgertonDaphne BassetEloise CraneFrancesca StirlingGregory BridgertonHyacinth St. ClairParentsViolet BridgertonEdmund Bridgerton†GrandparentsAlexandra BridgertonLord Bridgerton †[3]OthersEdwina Bagwell(sister-in-law)Mary Sheffield†(mother-in-law)Billie Bridgerton(aunt)Hugo Bridgerton †(uncle)Georgiana Bridgerton(aunt)For a complete family tree, see theBridgerton family treeAppearancesFirstThe Duke and I For a complete family tree, see theBridgerton family tree Anthony Bridgertonis the eldest child of the Bridgerton family. One of the most notorious rakes in London, Anthony protects his family with as much fierceness as he commands respect as head of the Bridgerton family in the ton. But he struggles with unresolved trauma and fear left from the sudden death of his father, which has left him unable to trust and hesitant to welcome any emotion, especially love.
characters.personality_section: One of the most notorious rakes in London, Anthony protects his family with as much fierceness as he commands respect as head of the Bridgerton family in the ton. But he struggles with unresolved trauma and fear left from the sudden death of his father, which has left him unable to trust and hesitant to welcome any emotion, especially love.

characters.name: Anthony Bridgerton
characters.description: Anthony BridgertonBiographical InformationBorn1784 or 1785[1]StatusAliveTitle(s)9th Viscount BridgertonLord BridgertonFamilial InformationMaritalKate Bridgerton(wife)ChildrenEdmund Bridgerton IISiblingsBenedict BridgertonColin BridgertonDaphne BassetEloise BridgertonFrancesca StirlingGregory BridgertonHyacinth BridgertonParentsEdmund Bridgerton†Violet BridgertonGrandparentsLord LedgerVivian LedgerOthersEdwina Sharma(sister-in-law)(ex-fiancée)Father-in-law †Mother-in-law †Mary Sharma(mother-in-law)Winnie(aunt)Newton(dog 'by marriage')Eli(great uncle)[2]For a complete family tree, see theBridgerton Family TreeAppearancesFirstDiamond of the First WaterLastDance in the CountryCount21Seasons1,2,3, &4Portrayed byJonathan Bailey For a complete family tree, see theBridgerton Family Tree Anthony Bridgertonis the eldest Bridgerton son and the current Viscount Bridgerton. Upon the death of his fatherEdmund, he became the 9th Viscount Bridgerton and the head of the family. The quintessential English nobleman, Anthony is the eldest Bridgerton sibling and dutiful head of the family since assuming his late father's title of Viscount. Endlessly handsome, charming and rich, he's quite the catch on this year's marriage mart. But if he has any hope of fulfilling his oftentimes overwhelming duty of marrying and producing an heir, Anthony must first learn to temper his pursuit of pleasure.
